bitumen.title: Bitumen Laboratory Services
bitumen.description: Bitumen has various types based on usage location and manufacturing method. Their heat resistance, viscosity, and insulation properties under different conditions are determined according to the latest standards of the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) based on standards 12505-1 to 12505-10. At Dejpa Laboratory, we are ready to evaluate your bitumen samples using the most advanced equipment according to their type.

testing.title: Bitumen Testing
testing.description: Evaluation of bitumen samples using the most advanced equipment and based on ISO standards
features: Testing based on ISO standards 12505-1 to 12505-10

training.title: Training Courses
training.description: At Dejpa, we consider education and knowledge development in this field as our mission. We believe that by increasing the knowledge level of professionals in this field, we have created special courses for training students and those interested in this field.
courses: Training on penetration grade bitumen classification
Training on performance grade bitumen classification
Training on viscosity grade bitumen classification

bitumen.cta: We are ready to evaluate your bitumen samples
